name: Easy Turkey Soup
recipeIngredient: 1 cup packaged dried small shell macaroni
3/4 cup thawed Florida orange juice concentrate
recipeInstructions:
1. In a large saucepan, combine broth, water, thyme, and pepper.
2. Bring to boiling.
3. Stir in macaroni. Return to boiling; reduce heat.
4. Boil gently, uncovered, for 3 minutes.
5. Stir in vegetables; return to boiling.
6. Boil gently, uncovered, for 5 to 7 minutes more or until vegetables and pasta are tender.
7. Stir in turkey and thawed concentrate. Heat through.
8. If desired, garnish with oranges and herb sprigs.
Makes 5 (about 1 3/4-cup) servings.
